Overview
A child of a South African citizen only (who is older than 18 years old).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A child of a South African citizen only (who is older than 18 years old).

## Visa Fees

[Table:  PR 26D Child>18]

## Documents Required

## Photo Specifications
PHOTOGRAPH SPECIFICATIONS FOR VISAS
Photograph specifications for visas, permits etc
Photographs must be: 
- 35mm in width and 45mm in length
- A close-up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70
                                      – 80% of the photograph Of high quality with no ink marks, lines or creases and
                                      not damaged
- Taken against a white background
The photograph must: 
- Show you looking directly at the camera
- Have appropriate brightness and contrast 
Head coverings are not permitted, except for religious reasons, but your facial
                                        features must be clearly shown. 
Spectacles may be worn provided that the lenses do not make the eyes invisible.
                                      

[Table:  PR 26D Child>18]

## Processing Time
Applicants who have submitted their application at the South Africa Visa
                                    application
                                    centres in China can receive their processed envelop in Embassy/Consulate after 8
                                    months
                                    starting from the day after the date of submission. The processing time is counted
                                    from the
                                    date when the Embassy of South Africa in Beijing and the Consulate General of South
                                    Africa in
                                    Shanghai receives the application documents; it will not include the application
                                    delivery time
                                    between the Visa Application Centre and Embassy/Consulate. Visa application
                                    submitted in Chengdu/Shenyang/Wuhan /Xi’an
                                    Visa Application Centre will be delivered to the Embassy of South Africa in Beijing
                                    for processing. Visa application
                                    submitted in Guangzhou/Hangzhou/Jinan Visa Application Centre will be delivered to
                                    Consulate General of South Africa
                                    in Shanghai for processing. Please be informed that the processing time may vary
                                      depending on individual circumstances.

## Overview

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Exchange Visa]

## Documents Required

Please note:
- All the documents should be printed one-sided.
- Apart from the Health Certificate for International Traveler, a full original
                                      Medical Certificate DHA Form (DHA layout) should be submitted as mandatory
                                      document. Both reports should include the applicant's passport number with their
                                      name. DHA layout Form can be downloaded from the area of “Download Forms”.
For Shanghai Jurisdiction applicants, please kindly note:
- Banks statements from South Africa should be certified by a Commissioner of
                                      Oaths or the Police station within 3 months
- Clear scanned copy must be provided if the documents aren't original one.
- Please issue the
invitation letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3LbySMuYXua8A2P4GVNOPQ/8f6c7fdd21c89453c6e4fc062a23f280/invitation-letter-sample_Shanghai-Juris.pdf)
(if needed) according to the standard format.

## Photo Specifications
PHOTOGRAPH SPECIFICATIONS FOR VISAS 
Photograph specifications for visas, permits etc
 Photographs must be: 
- 35mm in width and 45mm in length
- A close-up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70
                                      – 80% of the photograph Of high quality with no ink marks, lines or creases and
                                      not damaged
- Taken against a white background
The photograph must: 
- Show you looking directly at the camera
- Have appropriate brightness and contrast
Head coverings are not permitted, except for religious reasons, but your facial
                                    features must be clearly shown. 
Spectacles may be worn provided that the lenses do not make the eyes invisible.

[Table:  Exchange Visa]

## Processing Time
Applicants who have submitted their application at the South Africa Visa
                                    application centres in China can collect the passport from the application centre
                                    after 8 weeks starting from the day after the date of
                                    submission. The processing time is counted from the date when the Embassy of South
                                    Africa in Beijing and the Consulate General of South Africain Shanghai receives the
                                    application documents; it will not include the application delivery time between the
                                    Visa Application Centre and Embassy/Consulate. Visa application submitted in
                                    Chengdu/Shenyang/Wuhan /Xi’an Visa Application Centre will be delivered to the
                                    Embassy of South Africa in Beijing for processing. Visa application submitted in
                                    Guangzhou/Hangzhou/Jinan Visa Application Centre will be delivered to Consulate
                                    General of South Africa in Shanghai for processing. Please be
                                      informed that the processing time may vary depending on individual circumstances.
                                    
The collection timing is the same period as each VAC’s operation time. To collect
                                    the passport, please bring the original acknowledgement receipt and any original
                                    Government Photo ID proof.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
For foreign nationals who are employed by companies outside of South Africa and wish to reside in the country while working remotely. This visa caters to various professionals, such as consultants, freelancers, contractors, business owners, software developers, designers, and other knowledgeable workers.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For foreign nationals who are employed by companies outside of South Africa and wish to reside in the country while working remotely. This visa caters to various professionals, such as consultants, freelancers, contractors, business owners, software developers, designers, and other knowledgeable workers. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Visitors Visa Section 11(1) (B) (Iv) For Prescribed Activity of Remote Work (Exceeding 3 Months To 3 Years)
                                  ]

## Documents Required
Checklist for visitors visa for remote work for Shanghai Jurisdiction (updated on 29 July 2025)

For Beijing Jurisdiction:
Should there be Police certificate, notarized or certified document provided, please provide both original and one copy.

## Photo Specifications
PHOTOGRAPH SPECIFICATIONS FOR VISAS
Photograph specifications for visas, permits etc
Photographs must be: 
- 35mm in width and 45mm in length
- A close-up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up
                                        70 – 80% of the photograph Of high quality with no ink marks, lines or creases
                                        and not damaged
- Taken against a white background
The photograph must: 
- Show you looking directly at the camera
- Have appropriate brightness and contrast 
Head coverings are not permitted, except for religious reasons, but your
                                          facial features must be clearly shown. 
Spectacles may be worn provided that the lenses do not make the eyes
                                          invisible.

[Table:  Other Activities]

## Processing Time
Applications are assessed individually, and time frames may vary, therefore you are kindly requested to wait until a decision on your application is taken and is ready for collection, as VFS Global cannot control or influence the processing times in any way.

## Download Forms
Please click here to download Visa Application Form DHA-84 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/76jPqfo0znF7KzuEggJAjh/1bef08f0d8943c628079d74f66281006/dha_84.pdf). 

According to the Personal Information Protection Law of the People’s Republic of
                                    China and other applicable laws and regulations to protect your personal
                                    information, VFS Global must obtain the consent from you for the processing of your
                                    personal data and proceed with your visa application. Please download, print, fill,
                                    sign and submit the consent form along with your visa application form, without
                                    which we will not be able to proceed with the application lodgment. Click
                                      here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4lBowN9HvBBCuXcNaQOO1b/07b2b4b02ddbffa144f3f472f84f8371/Consent-Form-version-6.pdf)
Please click here to download Medical Certificate DHA Form

Requirements for entering South Africa
You will need the following if you wish to visit South Africa:
- A valid and acceptable passport or travel document for your intended stay
- At least one blank page in your passport for endorsements
- A valid visa, if required
- Sufficient funds to pay for your day-to-day expenses during your stay
- A return or onward ticket
- Yellow fever certificates if your journey starts or entails passing through the yellow fever belt of Africa or South America.

visa_types.name: Critical Skills Work Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
For Beijing Jurisdiction applicants, please also provide and note:
- One color passport size photograph with white background should be provided with the application, refer to area “Photo Specifications” for more details
- One copy of the passport personal data page (on A4 paper) should be provided. There should be at least two blank pages on the passport (one to endorse visa and one for entry stamps) and the passport should be valid for no less than 30 days after the expiry of your intended visit.
- Apart from the Health Certificate for International Traveler (certificate with red cover), a full original Medical Certificate DHA Form (DHA layout) should be submitted as mandatory document. Both reports should include the applicant's passport number with full name. DHA layout Form can be downloaded from the area of “Download Forms”
- If the original Police Clearance Certificate is non-English language, formal English translation is required.
- All the documents should be printed one-sided.
- If you submit the original documents without photocopies, the original documents will not be returned to you.
- Please ensure that all documents are translated in English if there are any documents provided only in Chinese.
For Shanghai Jurisdiction applicants, please note:
- According to the latest regulations of the South African Department of Home Affairs, Critical Skills Work Visa will be based on the PBS points system, please use the
point form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7uHX6YvhHU5046LqywPnyD/880e6052da31e8cbbbc4a005456781b3/pbs-form-oct-24.pdf)
.
- Please refer to the
Critical Skills Occupation List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/45Z8Rnz28mPApl9Iv74B6f/17ee19843a24fdd0dbba7bbef970a5ad/critcal-skills.pdf)
to evaluate related occupations.
- All documents must be signed by the applicant himself, and all originals or scans must be printed and photocopied, and the content must be clearly visible.
- Please issue the
invitation letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3LbySMuYXua8A2P4GVNOPQ/8f6c7fdd21c89453c6e4fc062a23f280/invitation-letter-sample_Shanghai-Juris.pdf)
(if needed) according to the standard format.
- In addition to the International Travel Health Examination Certificate (small red book), the
original medical certificate (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/JzpwIaJ98wbhS7wMUqPcq/c911fa3ea8ee13feb586c1999efe0e49/BI-811-medical-certificate.pdf)
in the form required by the South African Department of Home Affairs is also a mandatory application material, which must include the applicant's name and passport number.
- Please make sure that all Chinese materials are translated into English.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for applicants apply a Critical Skills Work Visa

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Critical Skills Work Visa]

## Documents Required

For Beijing Jurisdiction applicants, please also provide and note:
- One color passport size photograph with white background should be provided with the application, refer to area “Photo Specifications” for more details
- One copy of the passport personal data page (on A4 paper) should be provided. There should be at least two blank pages on the passport (one to endorse visa and one for entry stamps) and the passport should be valid for no less than 30 days after the expiry of your intended visit.
- Apart from the Health Certificate for International Traveler (certificate with red cover), a full original Medical Certificate DHA Form (DHA layout) should be submitted as mandatory document. Both reports should include the applicant's passport number with full name. DHA layout Form can be downloaded from the area of “Download Forms”
- If the original Police Clearance Certificate is non-English language, formal English translation is required.
- All the documents should be printed one-sided.
- If you submit the original documents without photocopies, the original documents will not be returned to you.
- Please ensure that all documents are translated in English if there are any documents provided only in Chinese.
For Shanghai Jurisdiction applicants, please note:
- According to the latest regulations of the South African Department of Home Affairs, Critical Skills Work Visa will be based on the PBS points system, please use the
point form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7uHX6YvhHU5046LqywPnyD/880e6052da31e8cbbbc4a005456781b3/pbs-form-oct-24.pdf)
.
- Please refer to the
Critical Skills Occupation List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/45Z8Rnz28mPApl9Iv74B6f/17ee19843a24fdd0dbba7bbef970a5ad/critcal-skills.pdf)
to evaluate related occupations.
- All documents must be signed by the applicant himself, and all originals or scans must be printed and photocopied, and the content must be clearly visible.
- Please issue the
invitation letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3LbySMuYXua8A2P4GVNOPQ/8f6c7fdd21c89453c6e4fc062a23f280/invitation-letter-sample_Shanghai-Juris.pdf)
(if needed) according to the standard format.
- In addition to the International Travel Health Examination Certificate (small red book), the
original medical certificate (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/JzpwIaJ98wbhS7wMUqPcq/c911fa3ea8ee13feb586c1999efe0e49/BI-811-medical-certificate.pdf)
in the form required by the South African Department of Home Affairs is also a mandatory application material, which must include the applicant's name and passport number.
- Please make sure that all Chinese materials are translated into English.

## Photo Specifications
PHOTOGRAPH SPECIFICATIONS FOR VISAS
Photograph specifications for visas, permits etc
Photographs must be: 
- 35mm in width and 45mm in length
- A close-up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70
                                      – 80% of the photograph Of high quality with no ink marks, lines or creases and
                                      not damaged
- Taken against a white background
The photograph must: 
- Show you looking directly at the camera
- Have appropriate brightness and contrast 
Head coverings are not permitted, except for religious reasons, but your facial
                                        features must be clearly shown. 
Spectacles may be worn provided that the lenses do not make the eyes invisible.
                                      

[Table:  Critical Skills Work Visa]

## Processing Time
Applicants who have submitted their application at the South Africa Visa
                                    application centres in China can collect the passport from the application centre
                                    after 8 weeks starting from the day after the date of
                                    submission. The processing time is counted from the date when the Embassy of South
                                    Africa in Beijing and the Consulate General of South Africain Shanghai receives the
                                    application documents; it will not include the application delivery time between the
                                    Visa Application Centre and Embassy/Consulate. Visa application submitted in
                                    Chengdu/Shenyang/Wuhan /Xi’an Visa Application Centre will be delivered to the
                                    Embassy of South Africa in Beijing for processing. Visa application submitted in
                                    Guangzhou/Hangzhou/Jinan Visa Application Centre will be delivered to Consulate
                                    General of South Africa in Shanghai for processing. Please be
                                      informed that the processing time may vary depending on individual circumstances.
                                    
The collection timing is the same period as each VAC’s operation time. To collect
                                    the passport, please bring the original acknowledgement receipt and any original
                                    Government Photo ID proof.

                                  and proceed with your visa application. Please download, print, fill, sign and submit

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A foreigner is a spouse of a South African citizen or permanent resident for five
                                    years and satisfies the Director-General that a good faith spousal relationship
                                    exists. Such permit shall lapse if at any time within two years from issuing of the
                                    permit, the good faith spousal relationship no longer subsists, save for case of
                                    death.
A foreigner who has been issued with a permanent residence permit in terms of
                                    section 26(b) shall, within the last six months of the second year following the
                                    issuing of that permit, avail himself or herself for an interview at any office of
                                    the Department.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A foreigner is a spouse of a South African citizen or permanent resident for five
                                    years and satisfies the Director-General that a good faith spousal relationship
                                    exists. Such permit shall lapse if at any time within two years from issuing of the
                                    permit, the good faith spousal relationship no longer subsists, save for case of
                                    death.
A foreigner who has been issued with a permanent residence permit in terms of
                                    section 26(b) shall, within the last six months of the second year following the
                                    issuing of that permit, avail himself or herself for an interview at any office of
                                    the Department.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  PR 26B Spouse]

## Documents Required

## Photo Specifications
PHOTOGRAPH SPECIFICATIONS FOR VISAS
Photograph specifications for visas, permits etc
Photographs must be: 
- 35mm in width and 45mm in length
- A close-up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70
                                      – 80% of the photograph Of high quality with no ink marks, lines or creases and
                                      not damaged
- Taken against a white background
The photograph must: 
- Show you looking directly at the camera
- Have appropriate brightness and contrast 
Head coverings are not permitted, except for religious reasons, but your facial
                                        features must be clearly shown. 
Spectacles may be worn provided that the lenses do not make the eyes invisible.

## Photo Specifications
PHOTOGRAPH SPECIFICATIONS FOR VISAS
Photograph specifications for visas, permits etc
Photographs must be: 
- 35mm in width and 45mm in length
- A close-up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70
                                      – 80% of the photograph Of high quality with no ink marks, lines or creases and

- Taken against a white background

visa_types.overview:
KNOW YOUR VISA TYPE

For Prospective Applicants
If you wish to apply for a short term visa, long term visa or permanent residence
                                permit to South Africa, kindly read the information on this site carefully. If you
                                follow the guidelines listed on this site, you will be able to submit your documents
                                accurately. This will reduce the chances of your application being rejected due to
                                inadequate or faulty submission of documents.
Note: Applicants who have already applied for a South Africa visa and wish to terminate their visa application, please contact us (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/zaf/contact-us)  to submit a withdrawal letter (Shanghai Jurisdiction) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2QJX620AXKcFFiqmmJ9yrA/8f15f84d3e66fcb3428383ecc6779696/withdrawal-letter-shanghai.pdf).
Who qualifies for this Visa:
A visa or permit may be issued to Chinese citizens and foreigners with valid residence
                                in the PRC. Only certain countries require a visa for South Africa. The countries listed
                                in Visa Exemption List do not need a visa (subject to the conditions indicated) for
                                South Africa. If a nationality /Country is not listed in the Visa Exemption List, then a
                                visa is required.
For Visa Exemption List, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3PzHopaQeCSpsRlLdzpXu2/c0ae1e498ccacc77e4df2e4103fa5733/visa-exemption-list.pdf)
Other important information regarding visas:
- Only applicants with valid residence in the PRC can apply through the South African
                                  Embassy & Consulate-General in the PRC.
- The visa only enables the holder to proceed to a port of entry before or on the
                                  expiry date of the visa, where the holder must comply with the applicable law,
                                  regulation and entry requirements.
- The visa shall upon admission, be considered to be a permit for the purpose of the
                                  Act and the period of validity of that permit shall be calculated from the date of
                                  admission.
- The period for which a permit will be valid will be set out under the heading:
                                  “conditions” on the visa label.
- Applicants must ensure that they apply for the correct visa/permit as any change in
                                  the purpose of stay may be refused if the purpose of the original entry was not
                                  correctly stated.
- The holder of a visitor’s permit may not conduct work unless specifically
                                  authorised to do so in terms of Section 11(2) of the Act.
- The holder of a visitors permit may not establish or operate a business.
- Visas cannot be applied for at a South African port of entry (for example, an
                                  airport).
- Any applicant allowed entry into South Africa due to misrepresentation, or false
                                  declaration on the application form or who stays in South Africa in contravention of
                                  his/her visa/permit conditions shall be guilty of an offence and liable on conviction
                                  to a fine or to imprisonment as an illegal foreigner.
- After a visa is issued, the passport must contain one unused “visa” page
                                  for entry stamps.
Countries for Yellow Fever Vaccination Certificate: 
A Yellow Fever Vaccination Certificate (If that person travelled to yellow fever
                                countries within 6 months before applying South Africa visa in China or intends
                                travelling from or through a yellow fever area), Vaccination Certificate is required
                                from travellers from these counties

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A permanent residence permit may be issued to a foreigner of good and sound
                                    character that has received an offer for permanent employment, provided that -
Such foreigner has proven to the satisfaction of the Director-General that the
                                    position exists and that the position and related job description was advertised in
                                    the prescribed form and no suitably qualified South African citizens or permanent
                                    resident was available to fill it.
The yearly limit of available permanent residence permits contemplated in section
                                    27(a)(ii) of the Act shall be as determined from time to time by the Minister, after
                                    consultation with the Ministers of Trade and Industry, Labour, Basic Education and
                                    Higher Education and Training, by notice in the Gazette.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A permanent residence permit may be issued to a foreigner of good and sound
                                    character that has received an offer for permanent employment, provided that -
Such foreigner has proven to the satisfaction of the Director-General that the
                                    position exists and that the position and related job description was advertised in
                                    the prescribed form and no suitably qualified South African citizens or permanent
                                    resident was available to fill it.
The yearly limit of available permanent residence permits contemplated in section
                                    27(a)(ii) of the Act shall be as determined from time to time by the Minister, after
                                    consultation with the Ministers of Trade and Industry, Labour, Basic Education and
                                    Higher Education and Training, by notice in the Gazette.

## Documents Required

## Photo Specifications
PHOTOGRAPH SPECIFICATIONS FOR VISAS
Photograph specifications for visas, permits etc
Photographs must be: 
- 35mm in width and 45mm in length
- A close-up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70
                                      – 80% of the photograph Of high quality with no ink marks, lines or creases and
                                      not damaged
- Taken against a white background
The photograph must: 
- Show you looking directly at the camera
- Have appropriate brightness and contrast 
Head coverings are not permitted, except for religious reasons, but your facial
                                        features must be clearly shown. 
Spectacles may be worn provided that the lenses do not make the eyes invisible.
